entities.girl: a girl reading her graded essay

scenes.title: The Graded Essay
scenes.background_prompt: A school desk with a marked-up paper, a pencil case, a textbook, and a window showing a schoolyard. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A classroom after school. A girl of about twelve with a brown ponytail and a denim jacket sits at a desk by the window, holding a graded essay in both hands. The paper has neat handwriting but is covered in the teacher's red ink marks — circled words, underlined phrases, and marginal comments. One prominent red circle surrounds the word 'becuz' with the correction 'because' written beside it in red. The girl studies the corrections with a focused, slightly frustrated expression, biting her lower lip. A pencil case and an English textbook sit on the desk. Through the window, the empty schoolyard is visible with a basketball hoop and painted lines. The afternoon sun casts long shadows across the desk. Other desks around her are empty — she stayed behind to review.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place girl at the desk by the window, sitting and holding a graded essay covered in red marks. Her expression focused, slightly frustrated, biting lower lip.
scenes.scene_description: In the foreground, a wooden floor with wide, light-brown planks stretches across the bottom of the scene. On the left, a small wooden chair with a curved back sits empty next to a sturdy wooden table. On the table, from left to right, lies an open white notebook filled with geometric diagrams and drawings, a green zippered pencil case with a small yellow star charm, an open textbook showing illustrations of a sun and a caterpillar, and a yellow pencil with a pink eraser. A girl with wavy brown hair tied in a low ponytail sits on a matching wooden chair on the right side of the table. She is wearing a long-sleeved sweater with horizontal orange and yellow stripes, blue jeans, and brown sneakers with white soles and laces. Her body is angled toward the left, and she holds a white paper essay in both hands, staring at it with a frustrated, frowning expression; the essay is covered in red ink markings and circles. Behind the table is a large, wooden-framed window divided by a central vertical bar, offering a view of rolling green hills, lush green trees, and a bright blue sky with fluffy white clouds. To the right of the girl is a wide, arched doorway that opens to the outdoors. A dirt path leads away from the doorway, winding past green bushes and grass toward a large, tan-colored house with a red-tiled roof and arched windows in the distance. The outdoor setting suggests a clear, sunny day with a bright blue sky and scattered white clouds. The girl is positioned between the table and the open doorway, with the house and path visible behind her to the right.

S: sunny day with rolling green hills
cozy room with a wooden table
large house at the end of the path
IE: receiving an essay with red marks
looking at a graded school assignment
IR: looking disappointed by the red circles
P: trying to understand the teacher's notes
A: holding a paper with both hands
staring intensely at the red ink
CO: the essay is covered in red marks
the girl has a frowning expression

ENP: a green pencil case with a star
a long-sleeved orange and yellow sweater
an open textbook with a caterpillar
SC: because there are many red marks
while she sits at the table
